headline: FOX SECURES LIVE NFL GAME PACKAGE IN MEXICO STARTING IN FALL 2026
summary: Fox Corporation (NASDAQ: FOX, FOXA; "FOX" or the "Company") and the NFL today announced a new multi-year agreement to bring football to FOX platforms in Mexico. Starting with the 2026 season, viewers in Mexico will be able to experience NFL content including live games, together with original production and specialized content designed to accompany them throughout the entire season.

headline: Assessing Fox Corp. (FOXA) Valuation As 2026 World Cup Advertising Upside Draws Attention
summary: World Cup spotlight puts Fox stock in focus Fox (FOXA) is back on investor radars after recent research highlighted its English-language broadcast rights for the 2026 FIFA World Cup and linked the stock to an estimated US$850 million in tournament advertising spend. See our latest analysis for Fox. Beyond the World Cup angle, Fox's share price has been firming, with a 15.01% 90 day share price return and a 24.82% one year total shareholder return.
